title: Outlook Integration Filter with "or" statements
excerpt:
I am trying to figure out how to filter incoming emails by “If Subject or Body includes [any of 5 different values] create an Item”. But the only option for multiple conditions is “And.” I need an “Or” option. 
Is there …

posts.author: klewis (Karli Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to figure out how to filter incoming emails by “If Subject or Body includes [any of 5 different values] create an Item”. But the only option for multiple conditions is “And.” I need an “Or” option.

Is there a workaround for this? I tried just creating separate iterations of the integration for each value I’m filtering for, and it just created five of the same items.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Karli!

Charlotte here from the monday team!

Unfortunately, there is no “or” capability in the automations at this time. However, if you want our support team to take a look at your specific workflow and make some suggestions for how we can make a workaround, you can DM us on any of our social media platforms or reach us here.

We’d love to take a look with you to get this figured out!
